mdx.excerpt:
sshmux I do a lot of my work on remote machines: EC2 boxes, my NAS, and whatever else I
happen to be SSH'd into. The problem was the…

frontmatter.title: sshmux
frontmatter.description: A tiny tool that gives me persistent SSH sessions using tmux, so my connections to remote machines survive drops and long-running jobs keep going.
frontmatter.bannercaption: sshmux host, and the connection just stays alive
